NHO - Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon

https://www.nho.no/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410bf4daa89ea69ff10e843cd/ytringsfrihet_dame_mobil_benk3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/be44154b2f6746de8bf772df0ae77320/20260106_robinson_ik_0318.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasset
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Aktuelt</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary" href="/medlemskap/" target="_blank"> Bli medlem </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (174 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

NHO Vestland

https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/nho-vestland/
Avvik: 192 | Bestått: 186
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/6286e0398c934d20a917198b1621938e/helene-og-richard-storevik.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasse
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/5a1f36cf25764211a136e4a81ee3164e/sondre-olsen.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/5a1f36cf257
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/0d6b03db12784b0a95778bf60e44b1ab/sommerjobb-stock-foto.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/0
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/regionforeninger/nho-vestland/artikkelarkiv/2026/ikke-snakk-ned-nye-naringer/">Kronikk: Ikke snakk ned nye næringer</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

<a href="/regionforeninger/nho-vestland/juridisk-hjelp/" target="_blank"> Juridisk hjelp </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arbinn.nho.no'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Kurs og arrangementer

https://www.nho.no/arrangementer/?c=nho-arrangementer
Avvik: 187 | Bestått: 211
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (180 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=1083&content.link=76195&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

NHO - Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon

https://www.nho.no/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410bf4daa89ea69ff10e843cd/ytringsfrihet_dame_mobil_benk3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/be44154b2f6746de8bf772df0ae77320/20260106_robinson_ik_0318.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasset
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Aktuelt</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary" href="/medlemskap/" target="_blank"> Bli medlem </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/arbeidsliv/artikler/2026/lansering-av-veileder-om-ytringsfrihet-i-arbeidslivet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410

CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (174 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=8&content.link=76192&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="d
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

NHO Trøndelag

https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/nho-trondelag/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 179
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/d42e5b2b37f34dc1b95f59087765b46a/skjermbilde-2026-02-06-102956.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contenta
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/749ae8585fa2414990ec442ee887e00a/nho-manedens-bedrift-ocean-autonomy-cluster---foto-lars-bugge-aarset-3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&wi
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/regionblokker/nho-trondelag/peder/img_5508.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/regionblokker/nho-t
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/regionforeninger/nho-trondelag/artikkelarkiv/2026/tips-til-bedrifter-i-vekst/">Tips til bedrifter i vekst!</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arbinn.nho.no'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Offentlig sektor og næringslivet

https://www.nho.no/tema/offentlig-sektor-og-naeringslivet/
Avvik: 182 | Bestått: 173
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/3629bdc88150485b8ef08a6eed31c3fd/img_13661.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/3629bdc8815048
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/a16772ebead0490c8267658467395dd5/kommune-nm_25_banner-1920x1080.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dfc3370b109e44dfa74dc8c531ad0687/img_13661.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/dfc3370b109e44
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Morgendagens helse- og omsorgstjenester</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/offentlig-sektor-og-naeringslivet/artikler/morgendagens-helse--og-omsorgstjenester--scenarioer-for-2040/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/contentassets/77ed5cf9888f45fdb2234ece4bcd7052/nhos-posisjonsarbeid_compressed_2808.pdf" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 121
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://innovativeanskaffelser.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Leverandørutviklingsprogrammet - LUP</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-arrow-square-out ic
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/offentlig-sektor-og-naeringslivet/artikler/2025/nominer-arets-vertskapskommune-for-naringslivet-2026/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/co
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/offentlig-sektor-og-naeringslivet/artikler/2025/vinneren-av-arets-kommune-nm-er-sola/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/a167

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (167 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=35&content.link=81321&content.category=869&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bærekraftig utvikling - hva bør din bedrift gjøre?

https://www.nho.no/tema/barekraftig-utvikling/
Avvik: 195 | Bestått: 174
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/fotoware--nho/2022/12/162304.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/fotoware--nho/2022/12/162304.jpg?m
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/fotoware--nho/2022/10/adobestock_2944183322.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/fotoware--nho/2022/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b22d9923ac5f48a4becb4fe8feb30662/fotoware-37196caefbd34325ac0b216ce707cbbb/" width="500"> </img>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Prøv NHOs bærekraftsguide</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/barekraftig-utvikling/artikler/barekraft/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/57b5cf885e17
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/barekraftig-utvikling/artikler/barekraft/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/artikler/eus-taksonomi-og-handlingsplan-for-barekraftig-finans/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width:
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/artikler/eus-taksonomi-og-handlingsplan-for-barekraftig-finans/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/klimatiltak-for-bedrifter/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/2412b
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/klimatiltak-for-bedrifter/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Skillelinje' appears 3 times

id="Skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=1054&content.link=338364&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Energi, klima og miljø

https://www.nho.no/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/e1aac58b65b743d086f9121e8cdec122/7d8261e483604ae480a5d455e3663738.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/conte
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/0fe7de3161774af199b7fcb7ac0f139a/img_8767.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/0fe7de3161774af
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2024/12/annikenhauglie-124.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2024/12/annike
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Kraftløftet</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/kraftloftet/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/61b54f1aecb9463ea60
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/energi-miljo-og-klima/kraftloftet/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

SERIOUS

Små og mellomstore bedrifter (SMB)

https://www.nho.no/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 169
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/10/49570.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/10/49570.jpg?mode=crop
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/52245163ee104124808fc98b4f25fd3b/norgeshus.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/52245163ee104
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b09acca0cf07449f91cce2730fc3a44a/medlemsundersokelsen_torunn_ole-erik.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Handlingsplan for små og mellomstore bedrifter (SMB)</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Hva særpreger små og mellomstore bedrifter?</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/contentassets/68a98262cc1e4fc18a47c437582bc0aa/handlingsplan-for-sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter-v2.pdf" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(m
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/tall-og-fakta-om-smb/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/fotowa
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/tall-og-fakta-om-smb/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/artikler/viktig-loft-for-smb/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/10/49570.jpg?mode=
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/artikler/det-haster-med-a-forenkle-hverdagen-for-sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter-i-norge/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/sma-og-mellomstore-bedrifter/artikler/medlemsundersokelsen-innsikt-som-styrker-naringslivet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentasse
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-nho/styrer-rad-og-utvalg/nhos-smb-forum/" tabindex="-1"> </a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (167 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=35&content.link=96760&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Norges "Draghi-rapport": Veien til vekst – Hva nå, Norge?

https://www.nho.no/tema/eos-og-internasjonal-handel/artikler/norges-draghi-rapport-veien-til-vekst--hva-na-norge/
Avvik: 179 | Bestått: 161
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (174 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=33&content.link=713337&content.category=867,2673&content.type.category=892,894&conten
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

NHO på jobb for deg | 2025

https://www.nho.no/pajobbfordeg/
Avvik: 210 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b6f2645158d3441aa1983dfdcd2a8583/some_ak_26-2.jpg?quality=100&width=1160" srcset="/contentassets/b6f2645158d3441aa1983dfdcd2a8583/some_ak_26-2.jpg?qu
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/826c54628cc14475b26d62682309692d/hvaskjerno-v2.png?quality=100&width=1160" srcset="/contentassets/826c54628cc14475b26d62682309692d/hvaskjerno-v2.png?
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>2025 ble preget av valgkamp og stortingsvalg der NHO kjempet for saker som er viktige for dere:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Medlemsfordeler:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2> </h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLpdvwKZnJmKZPOwQde-pTWtKV6txG5FJi" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Årskonferansen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Lønnsoppgjøret

https://www.nho.no/lonn-og-tariff/lonnsoppgjoret/
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 172
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/1/575092.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/1/575092.jpg?mode=crop
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c161d04c45f74748a01f563275af8a2a/bilde-til-nettsak.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/c161d0
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/faf851f4f2c746338a21c17a96a556ee/mekling-1.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/faf851f4f2c746
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/lonn-og-tariff/lonnsoppgjoret/artikler/2026/viktige-datoer-i-lonnsoppgjoret-2025/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/lonn-og-tariff/lonnsoppgjoret/artikler/2025/enighet-i-lonnsoppgjoret-2025-ansvarlig-oppgjor-for-bedriftene/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/c
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (168 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=35&content.link=84560&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<input checked="" id="query-" name="query" type="radio" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=1171&content.link=91460&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arbeidsliv

https://www.nho.no/tema/arbeidsliv/
Avvik: 186 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410bf4daa89ea69ff10e843cd/ytringsfrihet_dame_mobil_benk3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/be44154b2f6746de8bf772df0ae77320/20260106_robinson_ik_0318.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasset
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/2e95bd7ec90b4f82a00c5b1871e57340/adobestock_300203735.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/2e
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Hvorfor trenger Norge et arbeidskraftløft?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/arbeidsliv/arbeidskraftloftet/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/7c69bb2b1bc3448292b3df7
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/arbeidsliv/arbeidskraftloftet/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/tema/pensjon-og-forsikring/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Pensjon og forsikring</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"></span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/arbeidsliv/artikler/2026/lansering-av-veileder-om-ytringsfrihet-i-arbeidslivet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikkelarkiv/2026/james-robinson-motte-det-norske-trepartssamarbeidet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/be44154b2f6746de8bf772d
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/tema/arbeidsliv/artikler/2026/medlemsbedrifters-erfaringer-med-arbeidstilsynets-tilsynspraksis/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/029ffd72ba3546bb95333e2ebef617c7/micr
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arbinn.nho.no'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/"> <span>Gå til arbinn.nho.no</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Skillelinje' appears 4 times

id="Skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (168 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=35&content.link=80130&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

NHO Vestfold og Telemark

https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/nho-vestfold-telemark/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/nho-regioner-filer/nho-vestfold-og-telemark/jul-i-teamet-2025---2.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteasse
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/bilde-1-brobygger3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/bilde-1-
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/3/dalen-mekaniske-mars-2025.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/3/d
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/regionforeninger/nho-vestfold-telemark/artikkelarkiv/god-jul/">God jul og godt nytt år!</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arbinn.nho.no'

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Samarbeid og prosjekter

https://www.nho.no/samarbeid/
Avvik: 181 | Bestått: 157
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://digitalnorway.com/nho/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Digital Norway</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-arrow-square-out icon icon-external"></span>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.noxfondet.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">NOx-fondet</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"></span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.fellestiltak.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Hovedorganisasjonenes fellestiltak</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=35&content.link=85721&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--medium"> Aktuelt om privat eierskap</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--medium"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta gjerne kontakt</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

NHO Agder

https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/nho-agder/
Avvik: 192 | Bestått: 187
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_2841.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_2841.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/35c7223717874853a3f5dd5375e38659/fotoware-d88106ca6dd44fca83aa924fbe6bdf3a/" width="500"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/a354b1185232484e80abd7df7b7d2fff/fotoware-0be4be2313034fbd9e837338b8075864.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcse
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'lenke-liste' appears 3 times

id="lenke-liste"
Each ID must be unique on the page

CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/8273643c0be34ff39ba018617b67adf9/834bffea-6542-4e2f-bf69-dc7946d0cb84-ezgif.webp?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" src

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/regionforeninger/nho-rogaland/artikkelarkiv/vil-du-bli-var-nye-kollega-seniorradgiver-sokes/">Vil du bli vår nye kollega? Seniorrådgiver søkes</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Bruk av informasjonskapsler (cookies) Bruk av informasjonskapsler (cookies)

https://www.nho.no/informasjon/bruk-av-informasjonskapsler-cookies/
Avvik: 180 | Bestått: 160
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Samtykke til bruk av informasjonskapslene</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (174 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-NX37N7&content.type.id=33&content.link=92626&content.category=&content.type.category=896&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

NHO - Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon

https://www.nho.no/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c3cfa12410bf4daa89ea69ff10e843cd/ytringsfrihet_dame_mobil_benk3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/221182.jpg?mode=crop
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/be44154b2f6746de8bf772df0ae77320/20260106_robinson_ik_0318.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasset

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Aktuelt</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhosiden">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
